description_long: This bungalow features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a flat, overhanging roof that provides shade to the upper balcony. The structure is composed of two main levels, with the upper floor partially cantilevered over the lower, creating a sheltered area beneath. A prominent staircase leads from the ground to the first floor, flanked by slender columns for support. The exterior surfaces are finished in a combination of light gray and white, with a large wooden deck extending around the building. Glass railings enclose the balcony, enhancing the open, airy feel of the design. The overall form is geometric and angular, with a focus on horizontal planes and open outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat overhanging roof, glass balcony railings, and a large wooden deck. The design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a minimalist aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the staircase, balcony with glass railing, and the overhanging flat roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cantilevered upper floor and the shadowed area beneath the balcony.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back wall and the extension of the flat roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the geometric layering of the two stories and the deck's extension.
